explanation: Added quotes around the filter string to test if the rule is sensitive to quotation marks.
Used single quotes instead of double quotes to test if the rule is sensitive to quote type.
Removed quotes around the filter string to test if the rule is sensitive to their presence.
Reordered the command-line arguments to test if the rule is sensitive to argument order.
Used the short option '-f' instead of '-filter' to test if the rule is sensitive to option substitution.
Used the short option '-a' instead of '-attr' to test if the rule is sensitive to option substitution.
